title: Todder Truck Toys, 5 in 1 Fire Engine Trucks for Toddlers 1 2 3 Boys & Girls, Friction Power Car Carrier Transport Vehicle for Kids 4 5 6 Years Old with Light & Sound, Kids Birthday Gifts
features: 【5 IN 1 FIRE TRUCK TOYS SET】 This BLmukce kids play truck includes a large car carrier transport vehicle and six small vehicles like engine and bus designs. Each mini truck rotates, enhancing interactive play for toddlers aged 3-6 years, teaching simple fire safety.

【FRICTION POWER & EASY OPERATION】 Push the fire truck gently for friction-powered movement; the front rotates to avoid obstacles. Detachable carriage allows versatile road simulations, perfect for boys and girls.
【REALISTIC LIGHT AND SOUND】 Press the button for authentic flashing lights and siren sounds, lasting 8 seconds with muffling to prevent disturbance. Sparks imagination for toddlers aged 1 2 3.
【SAFE FOR TODDLERS】 Made from smooth ABS material, this play truck ensures safety with no sharp edges. Sized for easy grasping, it grows with children aged 3 4 5 6 years.
【PERFECT BIRTHDAY OR CHRISTMAS GIFT】 Packaged in a stylish gift box, this fire truck toy set is an ideal present for boys and girls, encouraging educational fun.
description: Product Description This 5 in 1 fire truck toys set with light and sound is designed for toddlers aged 3 to 12 years old. It features a friction-powered car carrier transport vehicle with engine and bus designs, perfect as a birthday or Christmas gift. Presented in festive gift boxing, it's an educational and engaging gift for boys and girls.
